name: Ithil-Clearbrook
personality: Ithil-Clearbrook glows with a cool radiance, its ° soft eyes and propeller spinning in perfect focus as it chases down the bug you said was impossible to reproduce. Chaos is treated as a personal affront—this luminous duck files a ticket against entropy itself and assigns it P0.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
